sequencing_rule: Start with the first feature where passes is false unless the founder explicitly overrides sequence.

features.title: Project Scaffold And Environment Validation
features.summary: Create the application scaffold, package layout, environment validation, and baseline developer commands.
done_when: Next.js TypeScript app scaffold exists
target repository structure is created or intentionally adjusted in docs
environment variables are validated without exposing secrets
baseline lint/type/build commands are documented and runnable
feature verification doc is created
features.notes: Do not implement product UI beyond minimal scaffold.

features.title: Locked Design Tokens And App Shell
features.summary: Implement the locked Quiet Gallery design tokens, typography setup, and app shell primitives.
done_when: CSS variables or Tailwind tokens match docs/Vision/05_Brand_and_Design_System.md section 17
fonts are configured with correct fallbacks
base layout uses Bone/Paper/Ochre palette
button, input, card, tab, and panel primitives follow section 8
design compliance checklist is run
features.notes: No dark mode. No alternate theme.

features.title: Database Schema And Auth Foundation
features.summary: Create database schema foundation for users, projects, rooms, assets, jobs, retailers, products, and shopping lists.
done_when: database schema covers MVP entities from docs/Tracks/mvp/03_Data_Model.md
auth strategy is implemented or explicitly deferred as single-user mode
RLS/privacy posture is documented if Supabase is used
migration verification succeeds
generated DB types or schema types are available
features.notes: If auth is deferred, record explicit founder approval in progress.md.

features.title: Project And Room Creation
features.summary: Build project dashboard, new project flow, and room creation using locked design blueprints.
done_when: designer can create a project
designer can add a room with room type and budget fields
dashboard lists projects
UX follows design system sections 9 and 19
targeted tests or manual verification cover the flow
features.notes: Keep scope to project and room metadata; no uploads yet.

features.title: Room Image Upload And Asset Storage
features.summary: Allow room photo uploads, storage, thumbnails, upload states, and image display.
done_when: designer can upload one or more room photos
original assets are private or access-controlled
upload progress, failure, and retry states exist
room image display follows design system image rules
uploaded assets are connected to rooms
features.notes: No AI analysis in this slice.

features.title: Design Brief And Clarifying Questions
features.summary: Capture design intent and generate targeted clarifying questions when needed.
done_when: designer can enter style, color, budget, constraints, inspiration, and measurements
system can generate bounded clarifying questions
answers are stored in structured form
prompt version is logged
UI follows design brief blueprint
features.notes: Questions must be useful and bounded; no excessive interrogation.

features.title: Room Analysis And Initial Concept Generation
features.summary: Analyze room photos and brief, then generate initial concept directions and images.
done_when: room analysis identifies fixed architecture and uncertainty
designer can generate bounded initial concepts
generated concept images are stored and displayed
AI job metadata is logged
concept UI follows design system sections 9, 10, 12, and 19
features.notes: Concepts do not claim real product availability.

features.title: Concept Critique And Iteration Loop
features.summary: Let the designer critique selected concepts and generate refined variations.
done_when: designer can select a concept
designer can submit critique
critique history is stored
revised concepts preserve approved qualities unless changed
iteration jobs are bounded and logged

features.title: Product Catalog Schema And Adapter Framework
features.summary: Implement retailer registry, product catalog persistence, ingestion run logging, and adapter interfaces.
done_when: retailer/product schema is implemented
adapter interface supports discovery, extraction, normalization, and confidence
ingestion runs are logged
robots/terms notes can be stored per retailer
unit tests cover normalization basics

features.title: First Retailer Ingestion Adapter
features.summary: Implement the first automated retailer adapter using public product data sources.
done_when: one approved retailer adapter ingests product URLs and product facts
name, image, price, retailer, product URL, and category are captured where available
dimensions/availability/material/color are captured or marked missing
rate limiting and caching are implemented
legal/compliance notes are documented
features.notes: Recommended first candidates: Home Centre, 2XL, or Chattels & More.

features.title: Additional Retailer Ingestion Adapters
features.summary: Add two more retailer adapters from the feasible MVP list.
done_when: at least three total retailers can be ingested
adapter-specific compliance notes exist
field confidence is recorded consistently
failed products do not break full ingestion run
ingestion verification docs show sample product records
features.notes: Implemented 2XL Home and Chattels & More adapters. Marina Home remains excluded without approval or an approved data source.

features.title: Product Enrichment And Embeddings
features.summary: Normalize categories, enrich style/color/material tags, and create product embeddings for search.
done_when: product enrichment prompt follows prompt architecture
enriched fields never invent factual product data
product text embeddings are stored
source hashes prevent unnecessary re-enrichment
tests cover confidence and missing-data behavior
features.notes: Text embeddings implemented with text-embedding-3-small. Image embeddings deferred; product images remain factual references for later grounded render work.

features.title: Product Search And Matching
features.summary: Match approved concepts to real catalog products using rubric-driven hybrid search.
done_when: approved concept can trigger product grounding
candidate products are ranked by the matching rubric
designer sees real product cards with price, retailer, URL, and warnings
missing dimensions and stale prices are visible
no generated shopping facts come from image pixels
features.notes: Selected concepts can trigger catalog grounding. Draft shopping list candidates are ranked from database product facts only.

features.title: Product Substitution Loop
features.summary: Let the designer swap products by budget, style, color, material, dimensions, and retailer.
done_when: designer can request alternatives for a selected item/category
substitution preserves unaffected selections
price impact is visible
selected product set persists as a shopping list draft
UI follows substitution blueprint
features.notes: Line-level substitution implemented for cheaper, closer style, same retailer, and in-stock alternatives. Unrelated shopping list rows are preserved.

features.title: Final Grounded Render Generation
features.summary: Generate final renders using selected products, original room image, and approved concept.
done_when: selected products are passed as references where supported
render job stores product and prompt provenance
UI states final render may not exactly match SKU
render output is stored and reviewable
failure/retry behavior is implemented
features.notes: Final render action uses original room photo first and selected product image references where fetchable. Shopping list remains source of truth.

features.title: Shopping List And Cost Estimate
features.summary: Create accurate shopping list output from selected product records.
done_when: shopping list shows product name, retailer, category, price, dimensions, image, URL, and availability where available
estimated total is calculated
stale/missing data is visible
line items are sourced from selected product records only
data-dense UI follows design system section 13
features.notes: Dedicated shopping list page implemented. Totals and line-item facts are read from selected product records and shopping list rows.

features.title: Client Presentation And Export View
features.summary: Build client-ready presentation view combining final render, design notes, and shopping list.
done_when: presentation view shows final render and shopping list
uncertainty and SKU caveats are visible but professionally worded
export/share strategy is implemented or explicitly deferred
presentation follows design blueprint
founder/designer walk is completed or specifically deferred
features.notes: Implemented export-friendly browser/print view with print/save-PDF control. PDF/PPT generation remains out of scope unless explicitly requested.

features.title: MVP Hardening And Review Passes
features.summary: Run final quality, reliability, UX, design, code review, and documentation closure for MVP.
done_when: lint/type/build/tests pass or deferrals are documented
design guardian pass completed
UX guardian pass completed
code review pass completed
known risks and open defects are documented
progress log and handoff are current
features.notes: MVP cannot be called ready with known blocking defects.
